name: StrongDM
description: Infrastructure access management platform. Monitor user provisioning and access via SCIM API.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to StrongDM Admin UI
2. Go to Settings > User Management > Provisioning
3. Select the 'Generic' provider option
4. Click 'Activate' to generate a bearer token
5. Copy the generated token and paste it below

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies StrongDM SCIM API is accessible by listing users.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists StrongDM users provisioned via SCIM to verify access management.
